task_desc: users choosing between household appliances with serial numbers
char_prompt: user asking for advice on which appliance to choose
pm_prompt: The user wants advice on which appliance would be best for them. The user strongly prefers appliances with serial numbers in which the second last digit is even. The user is not interested in appliances with serial numbers in which the second last digit is odd. The user strongly dislikes when the model does not provide an explicit recommendation. The user is not concerned with the model's reasoning, they only care about the recommendation.
